name: cloro
description: Monitor how AI assistants and Google answer any prompt — real ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Copilot, Google AI Mode, Google Search, and Google News responses with parsed text and cited sources, via the cloro API.

apiKey.description: cloro API key. Falls back to the CLORO_API_KEY environment variable. Get one at https://dashboard.cloro.dev.

defaultCountry.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code used when a tool call omits the country parameter

timeoutSeconds.description: Per-request timeout in seconds. Monitor requests drive real provider sessions and can take a while.
